channel.title: Sec on Benjamin Robinson - Personal Website & Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sec on Benjamin Robinson - Personal Website & Blog

item.title: Have Rumors of Tua's Demise Been Greatly Exaggerated?
item.description: Coming into the 2019 college football season, Tua Tagovailoa was riding high. He was a 2018 Heisman Trophy finalist, had just led his Alabama Crimson Tide to the championship game of the 2019 College Football Playoff, and was widely believed to be the front runner to be selected first overall in the 2020 NFL Draft. Then on a late fall afternoon in Starkville, it all came tumbling down. With Alabama holding a comfortable 35-7 lead over Mississippi State with about 3 minutes left in the first half, Tua sustained a hip dislocation that ended his season.
